temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing a white collared shirt. He holds a white landline phone receiver to his right ear, his expression serious and intent as he speaks. The background is a blurry, cool-toned office environment. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a stylized font. A man speaks in a calm and professional tone, as if giving clear, direct instructions. His voice is steady and focused as he says, "牛头角，常辉工业大厦，二楼，OK？" (Niútóujiǎo, Chánghuī Gōngyì Dàshà, èr lóu, OK?). The camera cuts to a medium shot of a different man in a light blue, button-down shirt. He looks slightly to his right with a concerned or focused expression. In the blurred background, the first man can be seen out of focus, still on the phone. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The shot changes to a wider view of the man in the light blue shirt. He is now standing in what appears to be an office, with other people and desks visible in the background. He gestures with his right hand as he speaks, looking off-camera. The man on the phone is still visible in the background, now out of focus. The "风行网" text is still present. The audio is clear, with no background music or significant sound effects, creating a quiet and focused atmosphere that emphasizes the man's direct communication.
